text: I haven't skied in years, so come with me to my local crater to practice my skiing before this weekend because we're hitting the hills. Wish me luck! There is like a million kids here. This is about to be so embarrassing. This is going utter terribly. I suck. I truly suck and I hate. I hate sucking at things. How's it going? 50? Not too bad, not too bad. I hope this can be motivational for anybody who wants to pick up a hobby again. I suck. I fucking suck. Get down a hill. Isn't the problem. I'll be stopped by gravity or a tree or my own stupidity. I'm most scared about getting off the chairlift. Horrifying. That's going to be a horrifying ordeal. I told myself I have to skate all the way back to my car. I might be out here all night. There's nothing wrong with sucking at things. Let's make that really clear. I think there is so much to respect in somebody that's trying. This jump is just calling my name. It's like for the people who are like, oh, it's like skating. It's like skating. It's like getting back in the skating. It's like riding a bike. I want you guys to all go sit in the shower and feel bad about yourselves because it's not. It's truly not.
